case_title: BANK OF THE WEST DBA TAKEUCHI FINANCIAL SERVICES VS. KNAPPCO INC et al

docket_entries.description: UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2009, DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES, CSR #3689.
